oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Management practices of pre-weaned beef-ondairy calves on commercial calf ranches
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Bigelow, R.A.
Lancaster, P.A.
White, B.J.
Amachawadi, R.G.
Barnhardt, T.R.
Theurer, M.E.
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Breeding practices at dairies have shifted to produce more beef-on-dairy calves that are sent off-site to calf ranches for raising. Multiple surveys have reported the management of replace­ment dairy heifers, but little or no information is available about beef-on-dairy calves. The objective of this survey was to describe management practices of beef-on-dairy calves in com­mercial calf ranches.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 234
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
